background-size: 370px; } }\n  @media screen and (max-width: 920px) {\n    .hero {\n      background: none; } }\n.hero-content {\n  max-width: 600px; }\n  .hero-content h1 {\n    font-size: 64px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    line-height: 70px;\n    margin: 0 0 40px; }\n  .hero-content p {\n    font-size: 22px;\n    line-height: 30px;\n    font-weight: 500; }\n.card-wrapper {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);\n  margin: 20px auto;\n  gap: 20px; }\n  @media screen and (max-width: 810px) {\n    .card-wrapper {\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(1, 1fr); } }\n  .card-wrapper.upper-deck {\n    margin: -30px auto 20px; }\n  .card-wrapper .card {\n    background: #fff;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    padding: 40px;\n    filter: drop-shadow(0px 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12));\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    text-decoration: none; }\n    .card-wrapper .card:hover {\n      box-shadow: 0px 4px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); }\n    .card-wrapper .card svg {\n      margin-bottom: 40px; }\n    .card-wrapper .card strong {\n      display: block;\n      font-weight: bold;\n      font-size: 24px;\n      line-height: 24px;\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n      text-decoration: none;\n      color: #373F47; }\n    .card-wrapper .card p {\n      font-size: 16px;\n      line-height: 26px;\n      text-decoration: none;\n      color: #373F47; }\n    .card-wrapper .card .link, .card-wrapper .card a {\n      font-weight: bold;\n      align-self: flex-end;\n      font-size: 20px;\n      line-height: 24px;\n      color: #373F47;\n      text-decoration: none;\n      margin-top: 20px; }\n  .card-wrapper .card-icon-wrapper {\n    background: #373F47;\n    height: 200px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center; }\n  .card-wrapper.lower-deck .card {\n    padding: 0;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-decoration: none; }\n    .card-wrapper.lower-deck .card svg {\n      margin-bottom: 0; }\n  .card-wrapper.lower-deck .card-content {\n    padding: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    height: 70%;\n    justify-content: space-between; }\n  .card-wrapper.lower-deck.lower-double-deck {\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 30px; }\n    @media screen and (max-width: 810px) {\n      .card-wrapper.lower-deck.lower-double-deck {\n        grid-template-columns: repeat(1, 1fr); } }\n    .card-wrapper.lower-deck.lower-double-deck .card {\n      border-radius: 0;\n      filter: none; }\n      .card-wrapper.lower-deck.lower-double-deck .card:hover {\n        box-shadow: none; }\n      .card-wrapper.lower-deck.lower-double-deck .card .card-content {\n        padding: 30px 0; }\n      .card-wrapper.lower-deck.lower-double-deck .card a {\n        align-self: flex-start; }\n.homepage-headline-section h3 {\n  font-weight: bold;\n  font-size: 48px;\n  line-height: 52px; }\n.homepage-headline-section p {\n  font-weight: normal;\n  font-size: 18px;\n  line-height: 26px; }\n.half-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n  gap: 40px; }\n  @media screen and (max-width: 810px) {\n    .half-grid {\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }\n.tab-wrapper h2 {\n  font-weight: bold;\n  font-size: 48px;\n  line-height: 52px;\n  max-width: 750px;\n  margin-bottom: 100px; }\n.tab-container {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  justify-content: space-evenly; }\n  .tab-container .tab {\n    padding: 30px 40px;\n    border-radius: 5px;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    color: #373F47; }\n    .tab-container .tab:hover {\n      box-shadow: 0px 4px 4px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); }\n    .tab-container .tab strong {\n      font-weight: bold;\n      font-size: 24px;\n      line-height: 26px;\n      margin-bottom: 20px; }\n    .tab-container .tab p {\n      font-weight: normal;\n      font-size: 16px;\n      line-height: 26px; }\n\n/*# sourceMappingURL=homepage-styles.css.map */\n\n/* Article */\nnav#hub-sidebar {\n  background: #EDEEF0;\n}\n#content-head h1 {\n  font-weight: bold;\n  font-size: 48px;\n  line-height: 52px;\n}\n\n  body {\n  --header-logo-height: 4rem; \n  /*--container-lg: calc((100% / 3) * 1px);\n --hub-main-max-width: 1320px;\n  right-margin: 100px;*/\n}\n\n\n/*\n.rm-ReferenceMain .rm-Article {\n    max-width: none;\n}\n*/\n\n/* klaviyo custom footer styles go here */\n#klaviyo_footer {\n  background-color: white;\n  padding: 20px;\n  text-align: center;\n  border-top: 1px solid #dadee2;\n}\n\n.footer__item-container {\n  list-type: none;\n  text-align: center;\n  margin: 0;\n  padding: 0;\n}\n\n.footer__item {\n  display: inline-block;\n  margin-left: 16px;\n  margin-right: 16px;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n\n/* trying to hack the form styles */\n/* target the klaviyo form parent container for repositioning */\n.klaviyo-form {\n  bottom: 16px!important;\n  right: 16px!important;\n}\n\n/* target the form id as a class .kSSOuU to actually style the form */\n/* was told as of 5/3/2021 that this would not change unless a new new form was added, \n   so we use a backup selector as well, just in case */\n.klaviyo-form form,\n.klaviyo-form .kSSOoU,\n.kSSOoU {\n  border-radius: 8px!important;\n  box-shadow: rgb(0 0 0 / 16%) 4px 8px 16px;\n  border-width: 1px!important;\n}\n\n/* code for accordion styles test */\n/* Style the buttons that are used to open and close the accordion panel */\n.accordion {\n  background-color: #eee;\n  color: #444;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  padding: 18px;\n  width: 100%;\n  text-align: left;\n  border: none;\n  outline: none;\n  transition: 0.4s;\n}\n\n/* Add a background color to the button if it is clicked on (add the .active class with JS), and when you move the mouse over it (hover) */\n.active, .accordion:hover {\n  background-color: #ccc;\n}\n\n\n/* Style the accordion panel. Note: hidden by default */\n/*\n.panel {\n  padding: 0 18px;\n  background-color: white;\n  display: none;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n*/\n\n.CodeEditor { \n  overflow: scroll !important; \n}\n\n/* Begin new homepage layout styles */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Bad Habits\";\n  src: url(https://www.klaviyo.com/fonts/bad-habits.woff2) format(\"woff2\");\n}\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Instrument Sans\";\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: auto;\n  font-weight: 400 700;\n  src: url(https://www.klaviyo.com/fonts/instrument-sans-normal.woff2) format(\"woff2-variations\");\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Instrument Sans\";\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: auto;\n  font-weight: 400 700;\n  font-stretch: 75% 100%;\n  src: url(https://www.klaviyo.com/fonts/instrument-sans-italic.woff2) format(\"woff2-variations\");\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n* {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n*:focus-visible {\n  outline: 1px dashed rgb(255, 255, 255);\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n.rm-LandingPage {\n  background-color: rgb(19, 19, 20) !important;\n  padding: 0 !important;\n  margin: 0 !important;\n  background-color: rgb(19, 19, 20) !important;\n  color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n  font-family: \"Instrument Sans\" !important;\n  font-weight: normal !important;\n  width: auto !important;\n}\nhtml, body {\n  padding: 0;\n  margin: 0;\n  font-family: \"Instrument Sans\";\n  font-weight: normal;\n}\nimg {\n  width: 100%;\n}\n.klv-container {\n  max-width: 1366px;\n  width: 100%;\n  margin: auto;\n  padding: 0 46px;\n  background-color: rgb(19, 19, 20);\n}\n@media (min-width: 792px) {\n  .klv-container {\n    padding: 0 83px;\n  }\n}\n@media (min-width: 1200px) {\n  .klv-container {\n    padding: 0 143px;\n  }\n}\n@media (min-width: 1373px) {\n  .klv-container {\n    padding: 0 80px;\n  }\n}\n.center {\n  text-align: center;\n}\n.klv-anchor {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  line-height: 20px;\n  color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n  text-decoration: none !important;\n  font-variant-ligatures: normal;\n}\n.klv-anchor:hover {\n  text-decoration: underline !important;\n}\n.klv-btn {\n  display: inline-block;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  line-height: 20px;\n  padding: 10px 24px;\n  border-radius: 50px;\n  text-decoration: none !important;\n  color: rgb(35, 36, 38) !important;\n  background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  border-width: 2px;\n  border-style: solid;\n  border-color: transparent;\n  transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n.klv-btn:hover, .klv-btn:focus-visible {\n  background-color: transparent !important;\n  border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n  color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n}\n.klv-btn--ghost {\n  display: inline-block;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  line-height: 20px;\n  padding: 10px 24px;\n  border-radius: 50px;\n  text-decoration: none !important;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  border-width: 2px;\n  border-style: solid;\n  border-color: transparent !important;\n  transition: all 0.3s ease;\n  background-color: transparent !important;\n  border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n  color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n}\n.klv-btn--ghost:hover, .klv-btn--ghost:focus-visible {\n  color: rgb(35, 36, 38) !important;\n  background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n}\n.klv-btn--tertiary {\n  cursor: pointer;\n  display: inline-block;\n  border-width: 2px;\n  border-radius: 0;\n  border-style: none;\n  text-decoration: none !important;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  line-height: 20px;\n  padding: 12px 30px;\n  background: transparent;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n  background-image: linear-gradient(currentColor, currentColor) !important;\n  background-size: 100% 2px;\n  background-position: left 100%;\n  color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\n  padding: 2px 0;\n  transition: background-size 0.5s ease-in-out;\n}\n.klv-btn--tertiary:hover, .klv-btn--tertiary:focus-visible {\n  background-position: right 100%;\n  background-size: 0 2px;\n}\n.klv-btn--tertiary:active {\n  opacity: 1;\n}\n/* end new homepage layout styles */","js":"//Announcement banner\nconst showAnnouncementBanner = () => {\n  // Prevent duplicate banners\n  if (document.querySelector('.announcementBanner')) return;\n                             \n  const announcementBanner = document.createElement('div');\n  announcementBanner.className = 'DeprecationWarning announcementBanner';\n  announcementBanner.innerHTML = 'Check out our new&nbsp;\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLHkNfHgtxcUanrkMnKPdkRzuWU7MGv_xM\" target=\"_blank\">YouTube playlist\u003c/a>&nbsp;of developer resources!';\n  \n  const deprecationBanner = document.querySelector(\"[class*=DeprecationWarning]\");\n  \n  if (deprecationBanner) {\n    deprecationBanner.parentNode.insertBefore(announcementBanner, deprecationBanner);\n  } else {\n    document.body.insertBefore(announcementBanner, document.body.firstChild);\n  }\n  announcementBanner.style.display = 'flex';\n};\n\n// Deprecaton banner text and CSS override\n  // Note: Banner hidden by default in the CSS file to prevent JavaScript / pageload flash\nconst overrideDeprecationBanner = () => {\n  \n  // get all nodes w/ class starting w/ DeprecationWarning\n  const deprecationBanners = document.querySelectorAll(\"[class*=DeprecationWarning]\");\n  \n  // Update deprecation banner text\n  const updateBannerContent = (bannerNode) => {\n    // TO-DO: Show different warning text depending on the version\n    bannerNode.innerHTML = \"These docs are for a deprecated API version. \u003cu>Click here to use the latest version.\u003cu/>\"\n  }\n  \n  // Show deprecation banner HTML element\n   const showBanner = (bannerNode) => {\n    bannerNode.style.display = '-webkit-box'; // Or any other appropriate display value\n   }\n   \n  // Update banner content and then show. Realistically we have 0 - 1 elements here.\n  deprecationBanners.forEach(updateBannerContent);\n  deprecationBanners.forEach(showBanner);\n}\n\n// remove versions older than 2 years from dropdown\nconst removeRetiredVersions = async () => {\n  const currentScrollPos = window.scrollY\n  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));\n\n  if (document.getElementsByClassName(\"rm-VersionDropdown-menu\").length === 0) {\n\t\t// only open dropdown if it is hidden\n  \tdocument.getElementsByClassName(\"rm-VersionDropdown\")[0].firstChild.click()\n\t}\n  \n  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));\n\n  // clicking the dropdown scrolls to the top of the page; we need to bring them back to their scroll/hyperlink position\n  window.scrollTo(0, currentScrollPos)\n\n  const dropdownContainer = document.getElementsByClassName(\"rm-VersionDropdown-menu\")[0]\n\n  const toRemove = []\n\n  for (const child of dropdownContainer.children) {\n      try {\n          const version = child.getAttribute(\"href\").split('/')[2].slice(1)\n          if (version === '1-2') {\n              toRemove.push(child)\n          } else {\n              const RETIRED_YEARS = 2\n              let today = new Date()\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoday.setUTCHours(0, 0, 0, 0)\n              const lastSupportedDate = new Date(today.setFullYear(today.getFullYear() - 2))\n              if (new Date(version) \u003c lastSupportedDate) {\n                  toRemove.push(child)\n              }\n          }\n      } catch {\n          // do nothing\n      }\n  }\n\n  for (const elToRemove of toRemove) {\n      elToRemove.remove()\n  }\n\n  if (document.getElementsByClassName(\"rm-VersionDropdown-menu\").length > 0) {\n\t\t// only hide dropdown if it is shown\n  \tdocument.getElementsByClassName(\"rm-VersionDropdown\")[0].firstChild.click()\n\t}\n}\n\n// clicks a span with specific text\nfunction clickSpanByText(text) {\n    const spans = document.getElementsByTagName('span');\n    for (let span of spans) {\n        if (span.textContent.trim() === text) {\n            span.click();\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nconst generateRequestExample = async () => {\n  // click \"Examples\" button\n  clickSpanByText('Examples');\n\n\tawait new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));\n\n  // click \"Request Examples\" from dropdown\n  clickSpanByText('Request Example');\n}\n\nconst find_example_url = () => {\n    return document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelectorAll('pre')[2].firstChild.children[1]\n}\n\nconst press_example_button = () => {\n    try {\n        const button_row = document.querySelector('#ReferencePlayground').lastChild.lastChild.lastChild.lastChild.lastChild.lastChild\n        if (button_row.firstChild.lastChild.innerText) {\n            button_row.firstChild.click()\n        }\n    }   \n    catch (e) {}\n}\n\nfunction expandFields() {\n    var bodyParams;\n    document.querySelectorAll('[type=\"button\"]').forEach((ele) => {if(ele.children && ele.children[0] && (ele.children[0].innerText === \"DATA OBJECT\" || ele.children[0].innerText === \"ADD OBJECT\") &&  Array.from(ele.parentElement.parentElement.children).indexOf(ele.parentElement) === 1) {bodyParams = ele}})\n    if (bodyParams) {\n        bodyParams.click()\n        function openFields(elementForSearch) {\n            if (!elementForSearch.parentElement.children[1]) {return}\n            const nestedButtons = Array.from(elementForSearch.parentElement.children[1].getElementsByTagName(\"button\"))\n            if(nestedButtons.length > 0) {\n            nestedButtons.forEach((ele) => {ele.click(); openFields(ele)})\n            }\n        }\n        openFields(bodyParams)\n    }\n}\n\n\n// Options for the observer (which mutations to observe)\nconst config = {childList: true};\n// Callback function to execute when mutations are observed\nconst callback = (mutationList) => {\n\tdocument.querySelectorAll('[type=\"button\"]').forEach((ele) => {if(ele.children && ele.children[0] && (ele.children[0].innerText === \"DATA OBJECT\" || ele.children[0].innerText === \"ADD OBJECT\") &&  Array.from(ele.parentElement.parentElement.children).indexOf(ele.parentElement) === 1) {expandFields()}})\n\n    press_example_button()\n\n    if (document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet') && \n        document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code') && \n        !text_changer_placed_on_page) {\n            text_field_observer.disconnect()\n            text_field_observer.observe(document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code'), {attributes: true})\n            text_changer_placed_on_page = true;\n    }\n\n\n}\n// Create an observer instance linked to the callback function\nconst buttons_obs = new MutationObserver(callback);\nvar button_presser_placed_on_page = false;\nvar text_changer_placed_on_page = false;\n\nconst text_field_observer = new MutationObserver((mutationList) => {\n    try {\n        const example_url = find_example_url().innerText.replaceAll(\"\\\\\", \"\")\n        if (example_url) {\n            const url = new URL(example_url.substring(1, example_url.length-1))\n            // removes broken query strings and then removes extra ? or & that are left over in weird places\n            url.search = url.search.replaceAll(/(((\\w+(-\\w*)*)(\\[\\w+(-\\w*)*\\])?=))(?!(\\w|-))/g, \"\").replaceAll(/((^\\?)(?![^&])|(?\u003c=&)&|&*$|(?\u003c=\\?)(&)|^\\?$)/g, \"\")\n            find_example_url().innerText = `'${url.toString()}'`\n\n        }\n    } catch (e) {}\n\n})\n\n$(window).on('pageLoad', function(e, state) {\n    overrideDeprecationBanner();\n  \tsetTimeout(removeRetiredVersions, 0);\n  \tsetTimeout(generateRequestExample, 1);\n  \t\n    const is_reference_docs = state.opts.path.includes(\"/reference/\")\n\n    const pathName = window.location.pathname\n    if (document.querySelector('link[rel=\"canonical\"]')) {\n        document.querySelector('link[rel=\"canonical\"]').remove()\n    }\n   \n\n\n    if (pathName.match(/^\\/(en\\/)?v/g)) {\n\n        // is a v1-v2 or v{date} but is the home page (nothing after the revsion)\n        const regex = /^\\/(en\\/)?v[0-9]{1,4}-[0-9]{1,2}(-[0-9]{2})?(?!(\\/))/g\n\n        if (pathName.match(regex) || pathName.endsWith(\"/reference/api-overview\") || pathName.includes(\"/docs\")) {\n\n            const docsToIgnore = [\n            \"/en/v1-2/docs/getting-started-with-track-and-identify-apis\",\n            \"/en/v1-2/docs/identify-api-reference\",\n            \"/en/v1-2/docs/track-api-reference\",\n            ]\n\n            if (! docsToIgnore.includes(pathName)) {\n                const correctLink = window.location.href.replaceAll(/\\/v[0-9]{1,4}-[0-9]{1,2}(-[0-9]{2})?/g, \"\")\n                const cononical = document.createElement(\"link\")\n                cononical.setAttribute(\"rel\", \"canonical\")\n                cononical.setAttribute(\"href\", correctLink)\n\n                document.head.appendChild(cononical)\n            }\n\n        } \n    }    \n    \n   if (!is_reference_docs) {\n        button_presser_placed_on_page = false;\n        buttons_obs.disconnect()\n    }\n\tif (is_reference_docs && document.getElementById('content') && !button_presser_placed_on_page) {\n        buttons_obs.disconnect()\n        buttons_obs.observe(document.getElementById('content'), config);\n      \tbutton_presser_placed_on_page = true;\n\t\texpandFields()\n        press_example_button()\n\n        // attach listener for code snippit listener \n        if (document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet') && \n        document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code') && \n        !text_changer_placed_on_page) {\n            text_field_observer.disconnect()\n            text_field_observer.observe(document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code'), {attributes: true})\n            text_changer_placed_on_page = true;\n    }\n\n    }\n\n    if (!document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet')) {\n        text_changer_placed_on_page = false;\n        text_field_observer.disconnect()\n    }\n});\n\n\n\n\nvar acc = document.getElementsByClassName(\"accordion\");\nvar i;\n\nfor (i = 0; i \u003c acc.length; i++) {\n  acc[i].addEventListener(\"click\", function() {\n    /* Toggle between adding and removing the \"active\" class,\n    to highlight the button that controls the panel */\n    this.classList.toggle(\"active\");\n\n    /* Toggle between hiding and showing the active panel */\n    var panel = this.nextElementSibling;\n    if (panel.style.display === \"block\") {\n      panel.style.display = \"none\";\n    } else {\n      panel.style.display = \"block\";\n    }\n  });\n}\n// copyright year in footer\n//document.getElementById('footerYear').textContent = new Date().getFullYear()\n\n// BEGIN HOMEPAGE USE CASE JAVASCRIPT\n$(window).on('pageLoad', function(e, state) {\n  \n  if(state.opts.path === '/') {\n    setTimeout(() => {\n      let selectedIndex = 0;\n      const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.klv-use-cases--tabs--tab');\n      const profiles = document.querySelectorAll('.klv-use-cases--profile');\n      const images = document.querySelectorAll('.klv-use-cases--image');\n      // process each set of elements when selecting an index\n      function setSelectedIndex(index) {\n        document.querySelectorAll('[data-selected]').forEach((el) => {\n          el.removeAttribute('data-selected');\n          el.querySelectorAll('a').forEach((anchor) => {\n            anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1');\n          });\n        });\n        for (const arr of [tabs, profiles, images]) {\n          arr[index].setAttribute('data-selected', '');\n          arr[index].querySelectorAll('a').forEach((anchor) => {\n            anchor.removeAttribute('tabindex');\n          });\n        }\n      }\n      \n      // add event listener for click event\n      var windowIsUnder520 = window.matchMedia(\"(max-width: 520px)\")\n      for (const [i, tab] of tabs.entries()) {\n        tab.addEventListener('click', (evt) => {\n          const {target} = evt;\n          if(!target.hasAttribute('data-selected')) {\n            setSelectedIndex(i)\n          }\n\t\t\t\t\tif(windowIsUnder520.matches) {\n    \t    \ttab.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest', inline: 'center' });\n\t    \t  }\n        });\n      }\n    }, 500);\n  }\n});\n// END HOMEPAGE USE CASE JAVASCRIPT","html":{"header":"\u003cmeta property=\"og:image\" content=\"https://drive.google.com/uc?id=1fYaJzHObD87SrY9EzKesI4klynB3D9ep\" />\n\u003cmeta property=\"og:image:width\" content=\"1200\" />\n\u003cmeta property=\"og:image:height\" content=\"630\" />\n\u003cmeta property='og:title' content='Klaviyo Developers'/>\n\u003cmeta property='og:description' content='Gain the knowledge you need to successfully integrate Klaviyo with your application. Tracking\nwindow.addEventListener(\"klaviyoForms\", function(e) {\n  if (e.detail.type == 'submit') {\n        if (e.detail.formId == \"T8QJGH\") {\n            _learnq.push(['track', 'Submitted API CSAT Form', {\n                \"CsatScore\": e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentApiCsatScore\"] ? e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentApiCsatScore\"] : \"\",\n                \"CsatFeedback\": e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentApiCsatFeedback\"] ? e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentApiCsatFeedback\"] : \"\"\n            }]);\n        }\n        else if (e.detail.formId == \"X66vPx\") {\n              _learnq.push(['track', 'Submitted API Feedback Form', {\n                  \"Feedback\": e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentApiFeedback\"] ? e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentApiFeedback\"] : \"\",\n                  \"ConsentedToApiFeedbackFollowup\": e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentConsentedToApiFeedbackFollowup\"] ? e.detail.metaData[\"MostRecentConsentedToApiFeedbackFollowup\"] : \"\",\n              }]);\n          }\n        else if (e.detail.formId == \"T3vNJj\") {\n              _learnq.push(['track', 'Signed Up for Developer Newsletter', {\n                  \"email\": e.detail.metaData[\"email\"] ? e.detail.metaData[\"email\"] : \"\",\n              }]);\n          }  \n    }\n  if (e.detail.type == 'close') {\n        if (e.detail.formId == \"T8QJGH\") {\n            _learnq.push(['track', 'Closed API CSAT Form', {}]);\n        }\n        else if (e.detail.formId == \"X66vPx\") {\n            _learnq.push(['track', 'Closed API Feedback Form', {}]);\n        }\n        else if (e.detail.formId == \"T3vNJj\") {\n            _learnq.push(['track', 'Closed Developer Newsletter Form', {}]);\n        }\n  }\n});\n\u003c/script>\n\u003c!-- HEAP   \nheap.load(\"91017801\"); \n(function() {\n    var quarters = 0;\n    var scrollHeight, quarterHeight, scrollDistance, divisible, scrollPercent;\n    document.addEventListener(\"scroll\", function() {\n        scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;\n        quarterHeight = scrollHeight / 4;\n        scrollDistance = window.pageYOffset || (document.documentElement || document.body.parentNode || document.body).scrollTop;\n        divisible = Math.trunc(scrollDistance / quarterHeight);\n        if (quarters \u003c divisible && divisible !== Infinity) {\n            scrollPercent = divisible * 25;\n            heap.track('Developer Portal - Scroll Depth', {\n                percent: scrollPercent\n            });\n <script async data-chunk="Footer" src="https://cdn.readme.io/public/hub/web/Footer.1ef292d2806307e79111.js"></script></div><script id="customJS">//Announcement banner
const showAnnouncementBanner = () => {
  // Prevent duplicate banners
  if (document.querySelector('.announcementBanner')) return;
                             
  const announcementBanner = document.createElement('div');
  announcementBanner.className = 'DeprecationWarning announcementBanner';
  announcementBanner.innerHTML = 'Check out our new&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLHkNfHgtxcUanrkMnKPdkRzuWU7MGv_xM" target="_blank">YouTube playlist</a>&nbsp;of developer resources!';
  
  const deprecationBanner = document.querySelector("[class*=DeprecationWarning]");
  
  if (deprecationBanner) {
    deprecationBanner.parentNode.insertBefore(announcementBanner, deprecationBanner);
  } else {
    document.body.insertBefore(announcementBanner, document.body.firstChild);
  }
  announcementBanner.style.display = 'flex';
};

// Deprecaton banner text and CSS override
  // Note: Banner hidden by default in the CSS file to prevent JavaScript / pageload flash
const overrideDeprecationBanner = () => {
  
  // get all nodes w/ class starting w/ DeprecationWarning
  const deprecationBanners = document.querySelectorAll("[class*=DeprecationWarning]");
  
  // Update deprecation banner text
  const updateBannerContent = (bannerNode) => {
    // TO-DO: Show different warning text depending on the version
    bannerNode.innerHTML = "These docs are for a deprecated API version. <u>Click here to use the latest version.<u/>"
  }
  
  // Show deprecation banner HTML element
   const showBanner = (bannerNode) => {
    bannerNode.style.display = '-webkit-box'; // Or any other appropriate display value
   }
   
  // Update banner content and then show. Realistically we have 0 - 1 elements here.
  deprecationBanners.forEach(updateBannerContent);
  deprecationBanners.forEach(showBanner);
}

// remove versions older than 2 years from dropdown
const removeRetiredVersions = async () => {
  const currentScrollPos = window.scrollY
  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));

  if (document.getElementsByClassName("rm-VersionDropdown-menu").length === 0) {
		// only open dropdown if it is hidden
  	document.getElementsByClassName("rm-VersionDropdown")[0].firstChild.click()
	}
  
  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));

  // clicking the dropdown scrolls to the top of the page; we need to bring them back to their scroll/hyperlink position
  window.scrollTo(0, currentScrollPos)

  const dropdownContainer = document.getElementsByClassName("rm-VersionDropdown-menu")[0]

  const toRemove = []

  for (const child of dropdownContainer.children) {
      try {
          const version = child.getAttribute("href").split('/')[2].slice(1)
          if (version === '1-2') {
              toRemove.push(child)
          } else {
              const RETIRED_YEARS = 2
              let today = new Date()
							today.setUTCHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
              const lastSupportedDate = new Date(today.setFullYear(today.getFullYear() - 2))
              if (new Date(version) < lastSupportedDate) {
                  toRemove.push(child)
              }
          }
      } catch {
          // do nothing
      }
  }

  for (const elToRemove of toRemove) {
      elToRemove.remove()
  }

  if (document.getElementsByClassName("rm-VersionDropdown-menu").length > 0) {
		// only hide dropdown if it is shown
  	document.getElementsByClassName("rm-VersionDropdown")[0].firstChild.click()
	}
}

// clicks a span with specific text
function clickSpanByText(text) {
    const spans = document.getElementsByTagName('span');
    for (let span of spans) {
        if (span.textContent.trim() === text) {
            span.click();
            break;
        }
    }
}

const generateRequestExample = async () => {
  // click "Examples" button
  clickSpanByText('Examples');

	await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));

  // click "Request Examples" from dropdown
  clickSpanByText('Request Example');
}

const find_example_url = () => {
    return document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelectorAll('pre')[2].firstChild.children[1]
}

const press_example_button = () => {
    try {
        const button_row = document.querySelector('#ReferencePlayground').lastChild.lastChild.lastChild.lastChild.lastChild.lastChild
        if (button_row.firstChild.lastChild.innerText) {
            button_row.firstChild.click()
        }
    }   
    catch (e) {}
}

function expandFields() {
    var bodyParams;
    document.querySelectorAll('[type="button"]').forEach((ele) => {if(ele.children && ele.children[0] && (ele.children[0].innerText === "DATA OBJECT" || ele.children[0].innerText === "ADD OBJECT") &&  Array.from(ele.parentElement.parentElement.children).indexOf(ele.parentElement) === 1) {bodyParams = ele}})
    if (bodyParams) {
        bodyParams.click()
        function openFields(elementForSearch) {
            if (!elementForSearch.parentElement.children[1]) {return}
            const nestedButtons = Array.from(elementForSearch.parentElement.children[1].getElementsByTagName("button"))
            if(nestedButtons.length > 0) {
            nestedButtons.forEach((ele) => {ele.click(); openFields(ele)})
            }
        }
        openFields(bodyParams)
    }
}


// Options for the observer (which mutations to observe)
const config = {childList: true};
// Callback function to execute when mutations are observed
const callback = (mutationList) => {
	document.querySelectorAll('[type="button"]').forEach((ele) => {if(ele.children && ele.children[0] && (ele.children[0].innerText === "DATA OBJECT" || ele.children[0].innerText === "ADD OBJECT") &&  Array.from(ele.parentElement.parentElement.children).indexOf(ele.parentElement) === 1) {expandFields()}})

    press_example_button()

    if (document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet') && 
        document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code') && 
        !text_changer_placed_on_page) {
            text_field_observer.disconnect()
            text_field_observer.observe(document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code'), {attributes: true})
            text_changer_placed_on_page = true;
    }


}
// Create an observer instance linked to the callback function
const buttons_obs = new MutationObserver(callback);
var button_presser_placed_on_page = false;
var text_changer_placed_on_page = false;

const text_field_observer = new MutationObserver((mutationList) => {
    try {
        const example_url = find_example_url().innerText.replaceAll("\\", "")
        if (example_url) {
            const url = new URL(example_url.substring(1, example_url.length-1))
            // removes broken query strings and then removes extra ? or & that are left over in weird places
            url.search = url.search.replaceAll(/(((\w+(-\w*)*)(\[\w+(-\w*)*\])?=))(?!(\w|-))/g, "").replaceAll(/((^\?)(?![^&])|(?<=&)&|&*$|(?<=\?)(&)|^\?$)/g, "")
            find_example_url().innerText = `'${url.toString()}'`

        }
    } catch (e) {}

})

$(window).on('pageLoad', function(e, state) {
    overrideDeprecationBanner();
  	setTimeout(removeRetiredVersions, 0);
  	setTimeout(generateRequestExample, 1);
  	
    const is_reference_docs = state.opts.path.includes("/reference/")

    const pathName = window.location.pathname
    if (document.querySelector('link[rel="canonical"]')) {
        document.querySelector('link[rel="canonical"]').remove()
    }
   


    if (pathName.match(/^\/(en\/)?v/g)) {

        // is a v1-v2 or v{date} but is the home page (nothing after the revsion)
        const regex = /^\/(en\/)?v[0-9]{1,4}-[0-9]{1,2}(-[0-9]{2})?(?!(\/))/g

        if (pathName.match(regex) || pathName.endsWith("/reference/api-overview") || pathName.includes("/docs")) {

            const docsToIgnore = [
            "/en/v1-2/docs/getting-started-with-track-and-identify-apis",
            "/en/v1-2/docs/identify-api-reference",
            "/en/v1-2/docs/track-api-reference",
            ]

            if (! docsToIgnore.includes(pathName)) {
                const correctLink = window.location.href.replaceAll(/\/v[0-9]{1,4}-[0-9]{1,2}(-[0-9]{2})?/g, "")
                const cononical = document.createElement("link")
                cononical.setAttribute("rel", "canonical")
                cononical.setAttribute("href", correctLink)

                document.head.appendChild(cononical)
            }

        } 
    }    
    
   if (!is_reference_docs) {
        button_presser_placed_on_page = false;
        buttons_obs.disconnect()
    }
	if (is_reference_docs && document.getElementById('content') && !button_presser_placed_on_page) {
        buttons_obs.disconnect()
        buttons_obs.observe(document.getElementById('content'), config);
      	button_presser_placed_on_page = true;
		expandFields()
        press_example_button()

        // attach listener for code snippit listener 
        if (document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet') && 
        document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code') && 
        !text_changer_placed_on_page) {
            text_field_observer.disconnect()
            text_field_observer.observe(document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet').querySelector('div.CodeMirror-code'), {attributes: true})
            text_changer_placed_on_page = true;
    }

    }

    if (!document.querySelector('pre.CodeSnippet')) {
        text_changer_placed_on_page = false;
        text_field_observer.disconnect()
    }
});




var acc = document.getElementsByClassName("accordion");
var i;

for (i = 0; i < acc.length; i++) {
  acc[i].addEventListener("click", function() {
    /* Toggle between adding and removing the "active" class,
    to highlight the button that controls the panel */
    this.classList.toggle("active");

    /* Toggle between hiding and showing the active panel */
    var panel = this.nextElementSibling;
    if (panel.style.display === "block") {
      panel.style.display = "none";
    } else {
      panel.style.display = "block";
    }
  });
}
// copyright year in footer
//document.getElementById('footerYear').textContent = new Date().getFullYear()

// BEGIN HOMEPAGE USE CASE JAVASCRIPT
$(window).on('pageLoad', function(e, state) {
  
  if(state.opts.path === '/') {
    setTimeout(() => {
      let selectedIndex = 0;
      const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.klv-use-cases--tabs--tab');
      const profiles = document.querySelectorAll('.klv-use-cases--profile');
      const images = document.querySelectorAll('.klv-use-cases--image');
      // process each set of elements when selecting an index
      function setSelectedIndex(index) {
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-selected]').forEach((el) => {
          el.removeAttribute('data-selected');
          el.querySelectorAll('a').forEach((anchor) => {
            anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1');
          });
        });
        for (const arr of [tabs, profiles, images]) {
          arr[index].setAttribute('data-selected', '');
          arr[index].querySelectorAll('a').forEach((anchor) => {
            anchor.removeAttribute('tabindex');
          });
        }
      }
      
      // add event listener for click event
      var windowIsUnder520 = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 520px)")
      for (const [i, tab] of tabs.entries()) {
        tab.addEventListener('click', (evt) => {
          const {target} = evt;
          if(!target.hasAttribute('data-selected')) {
            setSelectedIndex(i)
          }
					if(windowIsUnder520.matches) {
    	    	tab.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest', inline: 'center' });
	    	  }
        });
      }
    }, 500);
  }
});
// END HOMEPAGE USE CASE JAVASCRIPT

<script>
// CSAT Form Tracking
window.addEventListener("klaviyoForms", function(e) {
  if (e.detail.type == 'submit') {
        if (e.detail.formId == "T8QJGH") {
            _learnq.push(['track', 'Submitted API CSAT Form', {
                "CsatScore": e.detail.metaData["MostRecentApiCsatScore"] ? e.detail.metaData["MostRecentApiCsatScore"] : "",
                "CsatFeedback": e.detail.metaData["MostRecentApiCsatFeedback"] ? e.detail.metaData["MostRecentApiCsatFeedback"] : ""
            }]);
        }
        else if (e.detail.formId == "X66vPx") {
              _learnq.push(['track', 'Submitted API Feedback Form', {
                  "Feedback": e.detail.metaData["MostRecentApiFeedback"] ? e.detail.metaData["MostRecentApiFeedback"] : "",
                  "ConsentedToApiFeedbackFollowup": e.detail.metaData["MostRecentConsentedToApiFeedbackFollowup"] ? e.detail.metaData["MostRecentConsentedToApiFeedbackFollowup"] : "",
              }]);
          }
        else if (e.detail.formId == "T3vNJj") {
              _learnq.push(['track', 'Signed Up for Developer Newsletter', {
                  "email": e.detail.metaData["email"] ? e.detail.metaData["email"] : "",
              }]);
          }  
    }
  if (e.detail.type == 'close') {
        if (e.detail.formId == "T8QJGH") {
            _learnq.push(['track', 'Closed API CSAT Form', {}]);
        }
        else if (e.detail.formId == "X66vPx") {
            _learnq.push(['track', 'Closed API Feedback Form', {}]);
        }
        else if (e.detail.formId == "T3vNJj") {
            _learnq.push(['track', 'Closed Developer Newsletter Form', {}]);
        }
  }
});
</script>

(function() {
    var quarters = 0;
    var scrollHeight, quarterHeight, scrollDistance, divisible, scrollPercent;
    document.addEventListener("scroll", function() {
        scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
        quarterHeight = scrollHeight / 4;
        scrollDistance = window.pageYOffset || (document.documentElement || document.body.parentNode || document.body).scrollTop;
        divisible = Math.trunc(scrollDistance / quarterHeight);
        if (quarters < divisible && divisible !== Infinity) {
            scrollPercent = divisible * 25;
            heap.track('Developer Portal - Scroll Depth', {
                percent: scrollPercent
            });
            quarters++;
        }
    });
}());
</script>
<!--END HEAP TRACKING-->

<script>
  const setOriginalLocation = function() {
  if (!sessionStorage.getItem('hasSetOrigLoc')) {
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'originalLocation': document.location.protocol + '//' +
        document.location.hostname +
        document.location.pathname +
        document.location.search,
    });
    sessionStorage.setItem('hasSetOrigLoc', true);
  }
  return;
}
const cookieValue = (value) => {
    try{
        const cookie = Cookies.get(value);
        if (cookie) {  
            //https://stackoverflow.com/a/35002237/1892569      
            const base64regex = /^([0-9a-zA-Z+/]{4})*(([0-9a-zA-Z+/]{2}==)|([0-9a-zA-Z+/]{3}=))?$/;
            if(base64regex.test()){
                let decodedCookie = atob(cookie);
                try {
                    return JSON.parse(decodedCookie);
                }
                catch (e) {
                    return decodedCookie;
                }
            }
            return cookie;
        } else {
        return null;
        }
    } catch (e) {
        return null;
    }
}
const getFormattedDateTime = function() {
  const date = new Date().toString();
  return (date.indexOf('(') ? date.slice(0, date.indexOf('(')).trim() : date);
}
const gtmPageView = function(){
  const pageViewObject = {
    'event': 'pageview',
    'timestamp': getFormattedDateTime(),
    'non_interaction_flag': true,
    'UAId': 'UA-30451006-13',
    'userId': "",
    'gaId': cookieValue('_ga'),
    'loggedIn': false,
    'userIsExistingKlaviyoUser': false,
    'hostname': window.location.hostname,
    'url': window.location.href,
    'pagePath': window.location.pathname,
    'pageTitle': document.title,
    'pageType': 'API Docs',
    'pageQuery': document.location.search,
    'language': document.documentElement.lang,
  };
  window.dataLayer.push(pageViewObject);
  setOriginalLocation();
}
window.history.pushState = new Proxy(window.history.pushState, {
  apply: (target, thisArg, argArray) => {
    gtmPageView();
    return target.apply(thisArg, argArray);
  },
});
gtmPageView();
